headline: A Look At United Rentals (URI) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Performance
summary: What United Rentals offers and how it makes money United Rentals (URI) runs one of the largest equipment rental businesses in North America, with operations spanning the United States, Canada, Europe, Australia, and New Zealand across two main segments. The General Rentals segment focuses on broad construction and industrial equipment, including backhoes, skid-steer loaders, forklifts, earthmoving machinery, aerial work platforms such as boom and scissor lifts, as well as a wide range of...
